title: What Eva Unit did Misato pilot
display_title: What Eva Unit did Misato pilot
wikitext:
[]: What Eva Unit did Misato pilot?             Quote Post by ohnasti » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:19 am What Unit-# did Misato used? because i am pretty sure, she pilot a unit once.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:33 am Misato was not a pilot. Unless we're talking fanfiction, in which case all bets are off.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:54 am the one shaped like a beer cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:57 am SenorSquiid wrote: the one shaped like a beer cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 12:59 am SenorSquiid wrote: the one shaped like a beer cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:27 am Forgetting that Misato herself is an Evangelion, you guys are really silly SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:29 am Oh lawd, not the Misatogelion!

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:38 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Forgetting that Misato herself is an Evangelion, you guys are really silly SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:44 am riffraff11235 wrote: Does her umbilical cable get hooked up to the nearest Kirin brewery?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:48 am I knew there were two types of beer in Misato's fridge, but I could only remember Kirin. XP

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Nov 08, 2012 2:56 am How efficient is the Misatogelion?

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Nov 08, 2012 5:41 am riffraff11235 wrote: Evangelion Unit-Tailg8?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 08, 2012 1:01 pm SenorSquiid wrote: the one shaped like a beer cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Nov 08, 2012 1:06 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Forgetting that Misato herself is an Evangelion, you guys are really silly SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Nov 08, 2012 3:25 pm Dem Thighs.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 4:09 pm SenorSquiid wrote: You're my new best friend. Deal.

[]:             Quote Post by Der Kommissar » Thu Nov 08, 2012 4:17 pm SenorSquiid wrote: DUNGER

[]:             Quote Post by TheFlyingBeagle » Thu Nov 08, 2012 9:25 pm The MisatoGelion!! Came to think about it - at the time of the 2I she was 14, so she could have been (theoretically) a PILOT. That's why I like about EGf, you always learn something... cheers and good night!

[]: Re: What Unit-# did Misato used?             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Thu Nov 08, 2012 11:41 pm ohnasti wrote: What Unit-# did Misato used? because i am pretty sure, she pilot a unit once.
